summary: Multi-language license compliance audit powered by Trivy. Detects GPL/AGPL/LGPL/MPL/BSL and other risky licenses across Node.js, Python, Java, C#/.NET, Go, R...

latestVersion.changelog:
Initial release of license-audit.

- Multi-language license compliance audit powered by Trivy.
- Detects risky licenses (GPL/AGPL/LGPL/MPL/BSL, etc.) across Node.js, Python, Java, C#/.NET, Go, Rust, Ruby, PHP, and C/C++.
- Outputs reports to terminal, Markdown, HTML, JSON, Feishu Doc, and Feishu Base.
- Supports automatic stack detection, with pre-scan guidance (e.g. prompts for missing node_modules).
- C#/.NET projects are enriched via the NuGet API for more accurate license info.
- Includes quick start commands, risk classifications, and Feishu integration setup.
